---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why does it matter for users or research workflows?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature clearly and concretely.

## Example Workflow

How would a user use this feature in practice?

## Language/Model Impact

Check all that apply and describe any details:

- [ ] Network Generation Language changes
- [ ] Opinion Rule Language changes
- [ ] Simulation engine behavior changes
- [ ] Visualization/user interface changes
- [ ] Documentation/tutorial updates

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives and why this proposal is preferred.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, or related links here.
